chapter_title: Enactment & Enforcement of Certain Traffic Laws in Certain Municipalities
text: This chapter applies only to a municipality with a population of less than 2,500 in a county with a population of 250,000 or more.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 553. Enactment & Enforcement of Certain Traffic Laws in Certain Municipalities
##### § 553.001 — Applicability

This chapter applies only to a municipality with a population of less than 2,500 in a county with a population of 250,000 or more.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter applies only to a municipality with a population of less than 2,500 in a county with a population of 250,000 or more.
